parameters.content:
## 🌸 Florista WhatsApp Bot — Environment Variables

Set these in **n8n Settings → Variables** before activating:

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `WA_PHONE_NUMBER_ID` | Meta WhatsApp Phone Number ID |
| `WA_ACCESS_TOKEN` | Meta permanent access token |
| `CATALOGUE_PDF_URL` | Public URL of the catalogue PDF |
| `SALES_WEBHOOK_URL` | Sales team alert endpoint |
| `OPT_IN_WEBHOOK_URL` | Broadcast list storage endpoint |
| `CALLBACK_WEBHOOK_URL` | Call scheduling endpoint |
| `REVIEW_WEBHOOK_URL` | Post-event review tag endpoint |
| `SESSION_API_URL` | Session store GET/POST endpoint |
| `TIER1_TEXT` | Tier 1 pricing message (100–499 pcs) |
| `TIER2_TEXT` | Tier 2 pricing message (500–999 pcs) |
| `TIER3_TEXT` | Tier 3 pricing message (1000+ pcs) |

**WA Webhook URL:** `POST /webhook/florista-wa-bot`
**Order Confirm URL:** `POST /webhook/florista-order-confirm`

## UC1 – Lead Qualification
Sends two buttons on first contact.
Routes Decorator → opt-in → main menu.
Routes Personal Use → rejection + tag.

## UC4 – Main Menu
5-option list message:
- Get a Quote → UC8+2
- Download Catalogue → UC3
- Shipping Info → static reply
- Color Options → static reply
- Talk to a Human → UC9

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { from: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, textBody: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.textBody, buttonId: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.buttonId, msgType: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.msgType, userName: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.userName } }}

={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, type: 'text', text: { body: 'Thank you for reaching out to Florista! 🌸

We are a *wholesale-only manufacturer* with a minimum order quantity (MOQ) requirement. Unfortunately, we do not cater to individual or personal purchases.

For retail purchases, we recommend visiting a local event decor store near you.

Thank you for your understanding, and best of luck with your event! 😊' } } }}
={{ { event: 'retail_rejected', phone: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, name: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.userName, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }}

={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, type: 'interactive', interactive: { type: 'button', body: { text: 'Great to have you here, ' + $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.userName + '! 🌸\n\nWould you like to receive updates on *new stock arrivals and seasonal collections*?' }, action: { buttons: [ { type: 'reply', reply: { id: 'opt_yes', title: 'Yes, keep me posted' } }, { type: 'reply', reply: { id: 'opt_no', title: 'No thanks' } } ] } } } }}
={{ { event: 'broadcast_opt_in', phone: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, name: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.userName, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }}

={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, type: 'interactive', interactive: { type: 'list', body: { text: '🌸 *Florista Wholesale Menu*\n\nHow can we help you today? Please select an option below:' }, action: { button: 'View Options', sections: [ { title: 'What would you like to do?', rows: [ { id: 'menu_quote', title: '📋 Get a Quote', description: 'Request bulk pricing for your event' }, { id: 'menu_catalogue', title: '📄 Download Catalogue', description: 'Receive our full product PDF on WhatsApp' }, { id: 'menu_shipping', title: '🚚 Shipping Info', description: 'Delivery coverage and timelines' }, { id: 'menu_colors', title: '🎨 Color Options', description: 'Available shades and custom colors' }, { id: 'menu_human', title: '📞 Talk to a Human', description: 'Schedule a callback with our team' } ] } ] } } } }}

={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, type: 'text', text: { body: '🚚 *Florista Shipping Information*

📦 *Coverage:* PAN India delivery available

⏱ *Timelines:*
• Standard stock items: Dispatched in 1–3 working days
• Custom / large bulk orders: 7–14 working days
• Delivery after dispatch: 4–7 working days (varies by location)

📐 *Shipping Calculation:* Volumetric weight is used (our flowers are large but lightweight). Exact shipping cost is shared before order confirmation.

🏭 *Origin:* All orders ship from our Nagpur factory.

Reply *MENU* or tap the menu again to continue.' } } }}

={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message Fields').item.json.from, type: 'text', text: { body: '🎨 *Florista Color & Customization Options*

✅ *Standard Stock Colors (12 Pastel Shades):*
White • Ivory • Blush Pink • Baby Pink • Rose • Peach • Lavender • Lilac • Sky Blue • Mint Green • Lemon Yellow • Coral

🎨 *Custom Colors:* Available for bulk orders above MOQ. Additional lead time of 7–14 days applies.

📏 *Custom Sizes:* Available for select products on request. Please share your requirements for a custom quote.

💡 For 1000+ pieces, we offer custom color matching to your event theme!

Reply *MENU* or tap the menu again to continue.' } } }}
